title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in Manhasset, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Manhasset, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with bats in your Manhasset home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bat removal and exclusion services throughout Manhasset and the surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use safe, humane methods to remove bats and prevent their return, protecting your property and family from health risks.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Manhasset residents with expert bat control solutions. We're fully licensed, insured, and committed to humane wildlife removal practices that comply with New York State regulations, ensuring effective results and complete customer satisfaction.
localContext: Manhasset's tree-lined streets, historic estates, and proximity to Manhasset Bay create ideal conditions for bat populations seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and older architectural features. From the grand homes near the Miracle Mile to properties around Plandome and Munsey Park, our team understands the unique bat control challenges facing Manhasset's diverse residential and commercial buildings.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Manhasset?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Manhasset typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Manhasset and Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow specific regulations. Bats cannot be excluded during maternity season (May 1 – August 15) when flightless young are present. Our licensed technicians ensure all removal work complies with state and local wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my Manhasset home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark staining around entry points, accumulation of bat droppings (guano) in attics or on exterior walls, and seeing bats flying around your property at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How do you prevent bats from returning after removal?
faqs.answer: We use comprehensive exclusion techniques including sealing all entry points with durable materials, installing one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not re-enter, and addressing structural vulnerabilities. Our exclusion work comes with a warranty to ensure long-term protection for your Manhasset property.
